policy: Runtime model IDs are read from the ALLOWED_MODELS environment variable. Final model IDs are not hardcoded.
selection_rule: Choose an eligible allowed model for the selected Work Jurisdiction, with accuracy as the first gate and expected judged token count as the optimization target.
resource_name_boundary: Resource names are documentation for the observed planning seed list. Runtime execution uses the exact ALLOWED_MODELS value supplied by the environment.
seed_boundary: Examples are planning and benchmark context only. The application still reads ALLOWED_MODELS at runtime.
